category_sources: Official SourceForge project categorizes BitchX under IRC clients.
source_facts.description identifies BitchX as a text-based, scriptable IRC client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project use BitchX capitalization.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge repository README and doc tree are the available documentation surfaces.
Official homepage provides release links and project overview.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge BitchX project exposes its Code tab at sourceforge.net/p/bitchx/git.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project details list console/terminal UI and C/Tcl implementation.
source_facts.description says text-based, scriptable IRC client.
